text: I tried to update the app, but it keeps crashing when I hit install. Like, it's not even downloading. Maybe it's just my phone? Need help figuring this out.

I've been trying to upload my profile picture for the last hour, but every time I attempt it, the app gives me an error message. It's quite frustrating because I want to update my account with a new photo, and it just keeps failing. I checked my internet connection and even restarted my phone, but it still doesn't work.
Could you please tell me if the subscription fees are charged on a monthly or yearly basis? I seem to be confused.

I was wondering if there might be a possibility for an offline version of your application in the near future, as having a cloud-only option can be quite limiting for some users, particularly those in areas with unreliable internet connectivity. Any insights on this would be greatly appreciated!

I've been charged for the annual subscription but I only intended to sign up for the monthly plan. Could you please look into this and provide a refund for the difference? I really would appreciate your assistance with this issue.
I ordered a product two weeks ago, and I have yet to receive any updates on my delivery status. Could you please provide assistance?
